info: Woke up at 9:30 did some work then went to Chantilly to go eat some Indian food and go shopping . The drive there was fine but the drive back was during peak traffic which was awful. I got back and felt like a hex was on me , where I immediately passed out at like 5:30 and woke up at 9 to the sound of heavy rain. I have no idea if I’m gonna sleep and I need to finish some manatory complaints training but maybe it’s a 1 am or 6 am run lol.
Went to work got home and helped friend with his resume then hit the treadmill for 55 min for 4.5 miles while watching Wemby then played melee till 1 am I need to sleep earlier lol

Slept in past my meeting today lol and got some thai food for lunch which was not good sadly. Set up my IKEA table watched the cavs and then did some random work. Im gonna try my best to write if I stretched or not , I've been incorparting RDLS and those are so hard for me to do so hopefully i get better over the weeks and monhts.
Fought my server and docker permissions for hours , manifesting that this worked

Went to IKEA today to shop for a dresser, and some tables. Drove down and was overwhelmed by the choices so ate a Swedish meatball and went into the car and just looked up things to buy and went back in. Found a dresser that I wanted 70% off as is which was awesome but was a pain to drag into my car. Ate two cinnabons and a hot dog and then drove back. Idled around, went on a slow 5 mile run and then cooked up the chicken which was easily the best chicken I've ever made.

Tried cooking today , marinated Jamaican jerk chicken and then wanted to use my instant pot till I realized my lid was missing :/. I then tried to use the air fryer but the cheating prongs snapped off which was just unfortunate 
Read some more of the Iliad then
Got a random craving for a chicken sandwich so wandered to ballston and got hot Lola’s while testing my thigh which hurt 
Watched wenby and stretched .
I remembered! watched Wemby and read a little of out law while cooking a monstorifty of a meal with pasta.

Fixed and containezied my home server so when the WiFi is bonked I can auto restart and nuked prod at work lol. Got home made chai and played ranked to get to silver 1!
Went and scrambled to soccer where I was sore immediately but it was fun

Read the Iliad played some melee and ran . The run started absolutely horrible  despite me downng a Celsius with my hamstring tightening up half a mile in and then my right calf shooting in pain, but I refused to give in and ran with my hip and experienced bliss for the first time in what feels like forever it was like 14 min miles but I could run it forever and I felt truly happy with my life like fall of 24 happy and a quick reminder on why I run.

Ran 4.2 miles and both my brain heart and right side of my body were feeling great but my left side wasn’t I had the hamstring pulsating and at the break it felt like I strained it with sucked. Watched the Cavs and finished Out Law by butcher.
I cannot remember what I did today lol

Ran great falls today! Was going for 12-13 but hit 11 but such is the nature of the trail but felt amazing at around 12 min pace was flying some of the sections . Went home and watched Wemby and read a little of out law while cooking a monstorifty of a meal with pasta but because I’m by myself I have the freedom and time to mess things up which feels great.

Went to porchfest! Went to a pre with my soccer friends after doing some house stuff and then went to a pre with my soccer friends and then after wandered and hung out with some of my melee friends . Not all of music was listened to and not a lot of alc was drank but it was still funish but at the end of the night I didn’t want to interact with someone and empowered home but for some reason the guy left me in Rosslyn and I made the metro / trek home and passed out
Spent the entire day moving my stuff into my new place and will go to soccer , talking more in the dept in the blog post there’s also an essay I could submit and I should but I’m tired lol

Went to work went home and it was pouring so I chilled and messed around with some RL stuff for an hour at Kaldis social house  and made the trek to my to be old place one more time and watched some nba basketball. We are finally here….

Read some of the Iliad and then tried to run but between the pain in my entire left side and my mental state being wild I couldn’t really run and ended up walking out . I want this shit so bad I need toctry strethegning my hip 2 times a day as clearly my left hip is all my issues rn and I’m gonna keep running . All I can think about is getting out of this damn apartment almost out :)
Ate at indian buffet wrote a quick essay about triglav where i got roasted for no line breaks and paragraphs which is fair and i cannot remember a single other thing about this friday

woke up went on a 12 mile run at around lunch and felt pretty good besides my left left starting to hurt at the end. Talked to a couple of my freinds on discord from home until my parents came got some chinese food and picked them up drove them to the hotel where we ate it and yapped and tthen i tried in vain to find my invislagn and went to sleep

woke up at 8 ish had breakfast with my parents and then i showed them my new and old place. I cant wait to move out lol my mom clearly was dying inside when she saw the basemnt living along will be nice. We then drove to chanitlly and went to the air and spcae meusem and just caught up the whole time about my parents expeirnve in new york, and extnened familty. It was one of those things where i wont remember too many convos - one about snekaing into the temple with bags when it was raining and almost missing the trains but the feeling of warmth and joy was nice . I gave my dad a luka modric keychain and my mom a towel and mug and then said goodbye and drove home. I then ran for a mile felt my knee hurt and called it at 30 mpw.

Stayed at home and had 4 options of things to do for my Thursday night: run club soccer ai startup or book club dinner . The entire day I couldn’t really focus and was just parazlyed with indecision , not of those choices but of my minute to minute what to do since I was home . I finally decide to run 6 miles and I was feeling really good at the end running some 9 min miles for the first time in a while it felt like my hips and legs are finally opening up again. Then I quickly showered and went to the dinner and stayed there till 1 shooting the shit with various people until 1 in the morning which I think was the right decision .

Got up at 7 did some work and then ran at like 9 am to 10:30 ish then took a bus into work, as the metro was down. I went the wrong way so it took like an hour to get in where I then ate cookies did work and then took a bus back. I really didn’t feel like doing anything at home so I found a good translation of the Iliad played 2k and chillled.

Woke up at like 6 and warmed up legs and hit 6 miles which felt great. Went back and took a shower and then went to work where i caught up with one of my friedns ate burger fi than went downstairs to catch up with another friend and talked github copilot. Then i hung around the office till like 7 and then went to go watch baskebtal with some friends where we watched half the spurs game. After my roomate and his freidn were there so i said hi and talked about random gerrymandering which was cool and i still havent told them im leaving lol i passed out at 11 ish content.

Oh wow it was 4/20 I had no idea lol. Got my promotion for work which was hype went into the office and yapped most of the day and then went home and tried unsuccessfully to beat the haze that was my mind and just watched 3/4 th of the cavs raptors and went to sleep. My mental state is currently counting down the days until I get out of this place as I didn’t feel like going to run club because I would have to go home and interact with my Roomates lol 9 more days.

Woke up and went to book club talked about the three novellas but my mind is cloudy from the amount of pollen in the air for sure . Got lunch with them and then jogged 6 miles without too much trouble and then watched some playoffs and then went to sleep semi anxious about my promo decision in the morning.

First day back woke up at 8 am after sleeping for around 13 hours . Felt for the the first time in 10 days “ what to do “ when my friend called me up and we caught up where he said he got a gf! He also is coming to RI in a couple months so I’m hoping for a Boston trip. After that I kinda sat there waiting for something to happen got lunch at my Indian buffet and filled gas and then read a chronicle of a death foretold and then watched some playoff basketball and went to sleep. Not a great day mentally I am counting down the days till move out rn and it’s all encompassing.

Slept in my sleeping bag at the ljubana airport as we were the only two people in the airport , woke up around 4 am to check in and get past security and then me and my friend went into a calm exhausted silence for a bit before the flight. We then went to Amsterdam where I slept the whole way and then almost 15 min after we got off I said goodbye to my friend  rushing to catch his flight. I then idled around reading a night in chile for a bit and then ate Burger King and after 4 hours went into the transfer and then hopped onto my flight home where I passed out for the first hour finished a night in chile , the movie royal tenenbaums and sinnnere before the flight landed . Cleared customs after a bit and then hopped onto the metro home where I inadvertently passed out and was awoken by non other than my manager who was like “ um hello is this your stop” which is was and I blearlity walked another mile to my car where I walked home took my essentials out got dominoes and then passed out .

Woke up at around 7 ish and went downstairs to a pretty hearty breakfast and the IT guy was there which implies he walked the same route as us at like 4-6 am . We talked to the guy and he was like “ why did you come here and how did you find this ? From USA this makes no sense “ and we just smiled and prepared for the descent which after the first snow covered mile wasn’t terrible. On the way down we saw a mountain goat and got pretty close to him since he was also going down and he casually scaled a cliff and whirred after a bit. I realized halfway down I left the charger outlet and my charger up at the hut so hopefully they use it forever!The total hike down probably took around 4 hours and all the stores halfway through were open but the atm was covered up with a tarp so I went to the bar and prayed for 30 euros if I paid in card where the folks were happy to help and I grabbed a beer there and was in heaven for the next 30 min. I’m not sure I can drink casually anymore tbh the feeling of days long exertion rewarded by a small ambrosia is quite better than guzzling shots every weekend. We had some coffee which came with some chocolate cranberry stuff where we learned it had alchol , so after 5 years all the college boys took shots together !We were so tired and strapped for cash that we decided to forgo lake bled entirely but we saw it from the bus again which was good enough for me. We got back to the city center and I could see my friend getting more and more animated at the end of the 10 day journey . We wandered into a random Slovenian restaurant where the waiter ignored us for multiple minutes and we said nope let’s just go to kfc where we ordered a bucket and all destroyed it before going back to shower Triglav off of us and pack our bags one more time. We walked to get gelato one more time and it was actually pretty good and then we walked past the seedy meltrovlaka metro and waited impatiently while we watched a typical Balkans man go to work with a screwdriver and that was our last selfie. We saw our friend off at 12 percent battery for him and 10 percent for us just as the trip began and then hit the kfc again to charge my phone while we figured out how to get to the airport. After realizing there was no bus after 8??? we reverted back to caveman days and flagged down random taxis and eventually got one where we paid 50 euro to get to the airport . The max had a charger which was a godsend to my friend whose charger disientfrsted on the trip and we watched as he skipped red lights swerved through traffic and used an app that made empower look high tech but we arrived to a completely stark airport where we wandered called our moms and then knocked out me in my sleeping bag my friend on the couch.

Woke up around noon and went to ljubana skyscraper and saw the very normal skyscraper heights and then took a bus with the cash leaving us with 13 euros. We then went on a trip past lake bled which seemed very boring and then went to lake bohinj and ate food and started our trek to dom no Komi at around 6 . The first hour or so was essentially getting up to the mountain and then we took a bunch of switch backs until around 8 where the quintessential night horror begun. There was first a little bit of ice and then the entire mountain was just snow up the hill so we had to trudge through the snow in the dark and cold hoping to make it to the hut. I’m pretty sure one of my friends thought he was gonna die and I felt basically the similar level of stress as during a tough work shift . Once we got up and saw the hut it was literally just steep snow and that took a while. Once we got in no one was there and I was a bit worried I had to sleep just outside but after making enough noise some guy was very confused and realized that we were here for a reservation.  He woke someone else up and it turns out that there intentet was down so they had no idea we were coming. They gave us barley soup and then asked for 15 euros for linen , where we responded that we only had 12 . I don’t think she understood because it took an hour for her to understand that 12>15 but she accepted it and gave it to us and we were able to go to bed. My friends exclaimed that if we make it back down the snow alive we will kiss the ground in the us and go back to work renovated. I’m unsure myself I just feel an awful sense of foreboding about my life but i think my own place will really help me mentally and help me find myself. I still think Europe is an option but I think the digital nomad idea is a dream that has a lot of holes in it. I think sleep is needed , good night world

I need to move the deploy button down anyways , we wandered up the castle and then down into the riverwalk veranda after walking through some neighborhoods which looked much more Western European . We then watched a bunch of Balkan high schoolers participate in a rap battle and then scroll the streets chanting and we decided to plan a trip to Trieste and the caves while back in the cave.

Woke up ate some food and got some soveniours and then hit the bus to LJU! On the bus I got some great views of the Soviet bloc and the seat mate was staring at my phone the whole time until we got to the Slovenian border. We then had the authorities stare at our passport and as I learned later my friends in the back even more as we had no stamps from crotia ( thanks split!). After that we had a second checkpoint at the border where we had to get out of the bus and we were a little lost on what was going on. Then after grumping and ordering some coffee at the checkout, we watched as my friends seatmate got escorted off the bus and presumably deported!  The lady who was starting at my friend as well smiled and said fake passport and then we switched seats and my friend elucidated me on Slovenian suicide rates! We then got in the city and ate McDonalds while my other friend took his exam. We watched as the pidgeoms divebombed us and attacked the fries people dropped. We then did a whole lap of the city and went to the mellkova metro where Wikipedia says is an autonomous zone but the locals had no idea what that was and it screamed Portland druggie vibe. We stopped at a coffe shop and two local Slovenian kids asked us if we wanted to play slap, the card game. We shot the shit with them for a bit where they seemed shocked that we don’t sit for 3 hours to drink coffe and I lost both times lol. They invited us to their high school to watch a play (lol) but we decided to not catch a charge and just wandered around instead. After that we picked our friend up and got dinner and then wandered up the castle and then

Decided to take a road trip down south to some cave formations and go to Italy through trieste. We woke up late ish and I booked a rental car and drove down to the caves. Driving 130 km per hour which is like 80 if i my math is right felt impossibly fast but the drive wasn’t too stressful. The caves were beyond creepy and we spent the time hiking around and descending into the caves and taking photos when they told us not to it was very worth and I got my cave fix which I’ve been wanting to do for years. Next we drove to Trieste where I drove through the border checkpoint and was stopped? / I asked if we can go through and a grumpy Italian man took our passports and went “turista” and then got mad when we didn’t erepsond immediately. Similar to the Croatian police , the Italians were very confused as to why we didn’t have any stamps on our passports (thanks split!) and one of them was gonna let us through but the other was like “no!l then they made us pull aside for 25 min where they asked me if I had a translation license?? . We were convinced that we were gonna get deported but the grumpy man finally returned our passports and went were off! We parked and I walked over to the James Joyce cafe and ordered a ginseng shot of coffee and it turned about to be amazing ! I then got my photo with Joyce’s statue and then we went through the pouring rain in an attempt to find food at 5:30 where we learned buffet is not buffet and itialins don’t really do sit down. We finally found a place and ate and then we walked the pier ( no polar plunge !) and then walked back to the dedalus cafe to drink more ginseng coffee! We then spent the next hour spamming coffee shots to the confusion and bemusement of the ownder and then we drove back to no border shenanigans and took a shuttle back to the hotel.

Spent the day in Zagreb, we woke up late and left around 11 from the apartment since we were tired from camping. We rolled out into the daily cannon blast to signify midday and that was loud , we did a lap around the old town and read all the statues and kinda just drank it in. We ate at royal India which shockingly didn’t have chai and then we took a tram to the dinamo Zagreb stadium / park which was really cool. Afterwards we went out to eat  and then I had two shots and a beer which was the most I’ve drank in a min and we just wandered until 1 am. The night was definitely an introspective time for me as I’m not really sure what to do when I get back from this trip and move out to my own place but that’s part of the joys and pains of growing up I suppose .

Left split to go to the pltvice lakes and we were glad to get out of the Cozumel of Croatia . Hit the road listening to the local radio where some of the highlights were Croatian hakuna Matata and some folksy music. The coutnryside was interesting there were a lot of abandoned towns with caved in roofs and the “towns” were probably half a mile at smallest. We hit the pltvice lakes and they were like if you could wander around niagra falls with no rangers it was very cool spent the time taking pictures and arguing if Hemingway was a communist . We also stopped at a local diner and we saw that they kept actual bears in an apartment style cage and fed them spaghetti which was a bit depressing. We then went to camp near pltvice and set up camp and I realized i was super dehydrated and after chugging a ton of water I was able to sleep. It was my first time camping and years and I’m glad I was able to do it it rained but I was actually able to sleep despite it and the birds woke me up specifically an owl which reminded me of therous rant about owls in Walden.

Woke up from camping at around 9ish and drove to explored zeljava airbase! We made the mistake of trusting an ai and pulled up to a location 40 min away from the actual location so we just had to walk a side road for 2 miles or so to get there but once we did it was very very cool some insane shots and some Russians were just there in a group in all Teslas for some reason. The crazy part is that exit 4 is in Bosnia and we were steps away from leaving but wisely decided not to go. On the walk back the Croatian police stopped and asked for our documents and you could tell they were very confused to see random Americans wandering on a road. After that we drove into Zagreb and we quickly realized this is an actual city unlike split because we couldn’t find a place to park! My driver friend just did loops while we tried to figure out where the address was and which one of the keys was supposed to be used. Interestingly they don’t have numbers on idividual apartment buildings so it was a bit of a struggle but with a local we figured it out. We went to the airport to return the car  and figured out public transit to go back to the  apartment and then crashed because I was sleep deprived. Crazy day

Whoops I definitely hit the submit button on accident but always after I got into the room we walked around the old town in split to search for swim trunks and slippers where we went to a Zara and a couple random food stalls before we hit it. We then wandered around pretty much the entirety of split snapping photos and watching a group of balkans play football two m from the water where I kicked it with them for 2 min and walked away and suddenly looked back and they had (obviously) kicked it in the ocean and were begging a crawler to come help them out. We then saw wedding pictures on a “beach” with the sand so gross looking we decided not to swim after all . We then got some food and then my friend crashed while we wandered split in circles for 2 hours and eventually got bored enough to route our way back. Honestly not that many tourists and the only Americans wanted to sell us on some boat party lol

Finished Amsterdam flight and arrived at split around noon and we got picked up and checked in to our hotel around 1 after some shenanigans with finding the place. We awalked around split and I realized I had forgotten both

Went to Amsterdam! The flight honestly wasn’t bad in the beginning we showed up 5 min after boarding and there was a furious flight attendant who was like “you can’t just leave your bags we will call the police!!!!” And we sheepishly got in where I read a little and slept a lot. Then we went on a quest to find iced coffee lol because it doesn’t exist in Amsterdam and my friend really wanted some for some reason and we had to go to another gate to travel and he got stopped by security haha. On other news my server works overseas woohoo Tailscale ! I need to buy a water bottle and a usb c to c charger and we will see how split is!

Just finished playing soccer the leg hurt in the beginning but loosened as I played through which is a good sign. I just had a bad game where I couldn’t really pass or touch or anything but to be honest I just don’t enjoy the hyper competitive environment anymore. Anyways I signed my lease so in 23 days I’m out of my basemant and in my own space and in 1 day I’ll be in a plane to Croatia with my college buddies now I just gotta pack and hope I don’t wake up too sore !
Got my lease offer! Didn’t do too much besides watch a little of march madness and pack for Croatia read a little of brideshead too

decided to not go to infinte jest book club because i had not ran any of the essays. Spent the day ordering things for hiking on amazon, then deepcleaned my car and bathroom in preparation for hopefully moving out 2 weeks after my trip. Then went to the movie theare for the first time since covid and watched project hail mary at 9:30 and really enjoyed it and felt it was a faithful adaption to the book.

tried to run 5 and clealry wasnt feeling it got half a mile and felt a shooting pain down my leg and had to stop :(((, read a decent bit of theres no such thing as an easy job and finished twelve monhts!

slept for 12 hours and woke up groggy, quickly realzing this was allregy season. Drank some chai and read some brideside revisted which had in a high like transe with caffeince / histamines which is a fantaic novel. Tried to run again today but my it band is clealry in too much pain so im gonna need to take a week off :( that had me in a dismal mood until i got back and got my music server up! so in a way better mood now

Good day ran pacers thursday and met some new people, a future army ranger who had some crazy stories and physique and a swimmer training for a tri which was cool. Decided to make this updates page youre reading right now! Then decided to buy a thinkcrentre and bought it plus a charger now on the hunt for SSDS yipee!

Finished my reread of peace talks. Went to a so called tech meetup that really was a hodgebodge of people not in tech got back and was too tired to run but i am feeling super motivated to apply to new jobs and am gonna ping aome of my ex deloitte peeps to get the ball rolling because i can fucking crack this market.

Ran for 10 miles in the first time that feels like forever. The first 2-4 miles were dull creshdending pain that was getting to agony but my expeicne with this being temporary was true and legs really felt good at the end. Picked up stoner by john wilaims on a whim and read it in bascially two sittings today, and may go to the book club tmmrw if I can wake up for it. Also hit up one of my ex-deloitte coworkers for advice and got some really helpful stuff. Good day

Went to the dc classic lit book club! It was actually a really good time with some really well read folks discussing the whole idea of exitenastialism and the prose as characterization to name a couple points;the book club apparently has beeen going on for half a year and they meet weekky so its bascially a freind group which i think is pretty cool , i got lunch with them and yapped about heidgger camus modern art and hellen keller lol. my phone then was long dead and i had to wander the streets of DC looking for a library at 6pm and stumbled into a random apple store/library hybrid which was clutch. I then went home and finished battle ground, which after a month of a half concuudes my Dresden Files binge and I am HYPE to read 12 months even though i can almsot guarentee ifts gonna end on a cliffhanger. I then went on a 5 mile run to hit 30mpw but 1.5 miles in after a hill i realzied i was out of gas and scrambled to get to 4.167 or a yard but cleared it in 51. good day
Did my taxes and not much else lol added some imporvments to my youtube api and started twelve monhts but honeslty exhasuted so watched some spurs
Played basketball playoffs! I hit a 3 which was more points than all of my reuglar season. Went out after we lost and was way too tired to run even if wanted to and decided to sleep instead.

was exhaused most of the day , went in to the office and chopped it up with the boys. Read a chapter of peace talks learned about sliding window and applied to a couple jobs. Ran at midnight wasnt really feeling like mooving and crawled my way to 5 miles hamstrings were so and i really couldnt move but we did it

wanted to run 5 and soccer after watching some march madness but fell asleep at 5 for 2 and a half hours :(. Woke up and played pretty well had a decent look and a an assist but now super enegertic and ankle a little sore but full of energy, debating whether to go on a 1 am run or not. I've only ran 5 miles this week and have played soccer and basketabll so its tought for me to skip but 25 mpw is probaly ok im not gonna try to force the issue  esp in vien with how exchausted i was yesterday
Watched march madness and craweld 5 ankle sore but i was also tired

Watched some MM, did some leetcode and read some Twelve months, but my mind was a haze and i was in metnal pain that culminated when i tried to run 5. I feel like I could have easily spinrted but my mind wasnt displocned and i was beating myself over dumb things all day im not really sure why

woke up and immedaintly felt cofnrotned bt rhe dizzing amount of options of things to do today: A either go pick up an ssd 100 miles away, B go to book club with poems that I hadnt read, C Go thrfit and eat when im not really feeling a thrifty mood, D go watch the city final,E go run 10-13 miles in great falls , G go kick it with an online friend H go to a florida bar to watch the March madness. This drought to storm pattern is so frustating as I honeslty wouldnt have minded just chilling,watching the city gsme running and then watching the florida game but i defiently felt paramlyed ny choice. Honestly wirting it out has made it more clear that the only one i should cosnider is eating with my friends so i think writing stuff out like this helps. I think the things I NEED to do are A go run 10 min in the afternoon/evening because im only at 10 rn and maybe watch the Fl game at home lol i feel better. Dedided to go watch the city game, hang out with some friends and play melee in dc which was fun then watch the Fl game at home and then go on a 10 mile run which quily petred to a brisk walk but tems the break.

took a nap, then went to run club for the first time in a while and met a friend i hadnt seen in a bit. then played rematch with a olf school friend for 1.5 hours which was a blast and we went 12-3. then i decided to play some melee for 30 min which was 30 min too much. Definetly getting the itch to leave this aparemnt lol

went all the way to baltimore to pick up a cheap ssd and almost got in an accdient zoning out lol maybe it was the drive but i was feeling wound up like a livewire but got there and then had to drive to herndon on the other side of virgina for soccer. I probably used an entire tank on that journey lol but played soccer and was gassed immeadlily our team was good and i was defiently playing nervy the other team was really fast i havent played 11s since hgih school so that was exaushting but fun

went around and bought a screwdriver and messed around with getting the server up but i was foiled by my giant ass hdmi not fitting lol. I ran a mile today and had to call it because of how inclredily sore my lower body feels gonna take time to recupueate. Read a good bit of Twelve Months.
